name: THE FROST Cold plasma by skinlab. (2026)
shortDescription: THE FROST Cold plasma by skinlab. is the 2026 professional cold plasma device that combines cold plasma, warm plasma and ozone plasma technology in a single system. 9-in-1 treatment system, designed exclusively for cosmetic and aesthetic use.
description:
THE FROST Cold plasma by skinlab. is the professional electro-cosmetic device developed for the 2026 model year, combining cold plasma, warm plasma and ozone plasma technology in a single unit.

Its goal is to visibly improve skin condition without incisions, bleeding or long recovery times, designed exclusively for cosmetic and aesthetic use.

The device is not a medical device; it is used in a cosmetic environment. It falls entirely within the competence of beauticians, and complete legal documentation is included with every unit.
metaTitle: THE FROST Cold plasma 2026 | 9-in-1 Professional Cold Plasma | Skinlab Hungary
metaDescription: THE FROST Cold plasma 2026: 9 functions in one unit. Cold plasma, thermoplasma, ozone plasma technology. Acne, anti-aging, skin rejuvenation. 2-year warranty.

videoDescription.headline: The 2026 THE FROST – the next level of cold plasma technology
paragraphs: Demand for cold plasma treatments has doubled from 2025 to 2026 in Hungary. Clients learn from social media, watch foreign before-after videos, and specifically seek out plasma treatments.
The 2026 THE FROST model arrives with further refined treatment heads and enhanced energy regulation, enabling even more precise and effective treatments for your clients.
Salons that enter the market with THE FROST can deliver premium services at premium prices – gaining a real professional and business advantage.

training.headline: Device operator training – official adult education programme
training.intro: Professional device operator training is available for THE FROST 2026, provided within the framework of officially registered adult education. The training aims to give participants comprehensive theoretical and practical knowledge for the safe and professional use of the device.
items: Operating principles of cold plasma, thermoplasma and ozone plasma technology
Precise application areas and settings for all 9 functions
Treatment protocols for different skin types and concerns
Acne treatment protocol with ozone plasma
closingParagraphs: You are welcome to bring a model to the training so you can master treatment techniques in a real-world, safe and supervised educational environment.
Upon completion, we issue an official, FAR-system generated certificate with B-number, confirming competence in the professional use of THE FROST device.
If the training opportunity interests you, please contact us via one of our channels to arrange an appointment!

testimonials.name: Anita Kiss
testimonials.text: The 2026 THE FROST model was the best investment for my salon. <mark>My clients love the plasma facial treatments</mark>, and the ozone plasma function is fantastic for acne-prone skin. The device paid for itself in three months, and it's been pure profit since.

testimonials.name: Boglárka Tóth
testimonials.text: I was worried whether it was worth introducing such a high-end device. Now I know: <mark>cold plasma is what clients want</mark>. The 9 functions allow me to give every client a personalised treatment. The training was also excellent.

testimonials.name: Dóra Horváth
testimonials.text: I looked at several cold plasma devices, but THE FROST <mark>clearly stands out from the field</mark>. The anti-aging effect of thermoplasma treatments is impressive – my clients see the difference after just one treatment. The legal documentation is also in order, which is very reassuring.

expertQuote.quote: The 2026 THE FROST model is the most complete cold plasma system we have made available on the Hungarian market. The combination of 9 functions and three plasma technologies gives beauticians a unique opportunity to serve clients at the highest level.
expertQuote.author: László Horváth

faq.question: What is the difference between THE FROST 2026 and the earlier THE FROST model?
faq.answer: The 2026 model features enhanced energy regulation and refined treatment heads that enable even more precise treatments. The core 9 functions and three plasma technologies remain, but the treatment experience and effectiveness have been further improved.

faq.question: Can I legally use the device as a beautician?
faq.answer: Yes! THE FROST 2026 is officially classified within beautician competence. Complete legal documentation is provided with every device purchased from us.

faq.question: What skin problems is it suitable for?
faq.answer: Widely applicable: acne and problematic skin, fine lines, skin irregularities, skin laxity, dull complexion, scalp issues. Ozone plasma is particularly effective for inflammatory skin conditions, while thermoplasma is ideal for anti-aging.

faq.question: Is the treatment painful?
faq.answer: Cold plasma treatments are completely painless and work excellently even on sensitive skin. Thermoplasma treatments may cause a mild warm sensation, but it is not uncomfortable. Neither treatment type requires anaesthesia.

faq.question: How quickly does THE FROST 2026 pay for itself?
faq.answer: Cold plasma treatment prices typically range from 18,000 to 35,000 Ft. With 3-5 clients per day, the device generally pays for itself within 2-4 months. Use our ROI calculator for precise calculations!

faq.question: What training comes with the device?
faq.answer: One-day intensive operator training within officially registered adult education, free with device purchase. The training covers all 9 functions, treatment protocols, and includes practical treatments. An official B-number certificate is issued.

faq.question: Is there recovery time after treatment?
faq.answer: After cold plasma treatments there is no recovery time. After thermoplasma treatments, minimal temporary redness may occur, typically fading within 1-2 hours.
